user_request: My hull breach is failing during sealing — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My hull breach is failing during sealing — help

### TOPIC
hull breach sealing

### COMPONENT
hull breach

### OPERATION
sealing

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- hull breach
- sealing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Omnissiah, grant us succor! The hull breach falters in its sealing.
Congregation: We invoke the Machine Spirit of the hull breach!
Priest: First, engage the ferroceramic compounds upon the fractured aperture with methodical precision.
Congregation: The hull breach shall be made whole through blessed sealing!
Priest: Second, activate the electromagnetic containment lattice to stabilize the breach geometry.
Congregation: We chant the Litany of Structural Integrity!
Priest: Third, monitor the hull breach pressure differential whilst the sealing matrix cures in sacred union.
Congregation: By the Omnissiah's will, the hull breach is sealed eternally!

user_request: Emergency rite: electric motor requires shutdown
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: electric motor requires shutdown

### TOPIC
electric motor shutdown

### COMPONENT
electric motor

### OPERATION
shutdown

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- electric motor
- shutdown

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed Omnissiah, hear our supplication! The electric motor must surrender to shutdown.
Congregation: We honor the Machine Spirit of the electric motor!
Priest: First, disengage the primary power conduits with reverent care from the electric motor's terminals.
Congregation: The electric motor's blessed shutdown commences!
Priest: Second, initiate the electromagnetic brake sequence to arrest rotational momentum.
Congregation: We recite the Mantra of Deceleration!
Priest: Third, verify all auxiliary systems have ceased their vibration as the electric motor enters dormancy.
Congregation: The shutdown is complete; the Machine Spirit rests in sacred silence!

Congregation: The operation flourishes; the forge anvil heating burns eternal!
